Option.description: Represents an individual option considered during the decision-making process.

score.description: The evaluated score for this option.
score.title: Score

Option.title: Option

description: Represents a complete record of a decision made by the system.

decision_id.description: Unique identifier for the decision, formatted as a UUID string.
decision_id.title: Decision Id

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 formatted datetime string indicating when the decision was made.
timestamp.title: Timestamp

options_considered.description: List of all options that were considered.
options_considered.title: Options Considered

chosen_option.description: The option_id of the chosen option.
chosen_option.title: Chosen Option

reasoning.description: Detailed explanation/reasoning behind the choice (minimum 20 characters).
reasoning.title: Reasoning

confidence.description: Confidence score for the decision, ranging from 0.0 to 1.0 inclusive.
confidence.title: Confidence

agent_version.description: The version of the agent that made the decision.
agent_version.title: Agent Version

title: DecisionRecord
